untranslatable_reason: This signal requires fundamental/macro indicators not in the allowed list: (1) 5-year weighted-average sales growth ranking (GS) — a company fundamental metric requiring financial statement data; (2) GNP growth regimes and quartile classification — a macroeconomic variable; (3) Decile portfolio formation based on ranked fundamentals — requires cross-sectional ranking logic and regime-based return analysis. The signal is a quantitative factor strategy (sales growth reversion) conditioned on GNP cycles, neither of which can be expressed using only price-based technical indicators (RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, ATR, moving averages, etc.).
translation_notes: This is a fundamental factor strategy, not a technical trading rule. It requires: (a) access to historical sales growth data and ranking by decile, (b) macroeconomic regime identification (GNP growth states), and (c) portfolio-level backtesting logic. The 'REVERSION' category suggests a mean-reversion pattern in sales growth, but this cannot be captured by price indicators alone. To implement this signal, the backtest engine would need to support fundamental data fields (sales_growth_5yr) and macro regime filters (gnp_growth_state), which are outside the scope of technical indicators.
